description: A designed Department of Labor graphic on a black-to-navy gradient background featuring a dramatic, dark, dignified portrait photograph of Donald Trump (chest-up, dark navy suit, white shirt, red tie, flag lapel pin, stern expression, dramatically lit against shadow) in the upper portion. Across the middle in a large mixed serif font is the slogan 'American Workers FIRST!' ('American Workers' in italic, 'FIRST!' in bold roman). Below are three torn-paper headline cards, each topped by a real outlet logo banner and a verbatim headline in black serif: THE WESTERN JOURNAL ('Equipping Readers with the Truth' tagline) 'Trump Admin Launches 175 H-1B Visa Abuse Investigations in \'Project Firewall\''; Blaze Media 'Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown'; and a larger FOX NEWS card (blue banner) 'Trump admin reveals over 100 investigations into H-1B abuses as it pledges \'every resource\' to protect US jobs'. The propaganda technique aggregates conservative/mainstream media headlines as third-party validation of the administration's H-1B 'Project Firewall' crackdown, framed as protecting American workers from foreign-labor abuse (echoing the tweet about D.C. bureaucrats who 'sold out the American Worker'). Target audience: American workers and an immigration-restrictionist 'America First' base.
notable_text: American Workers FIRST! THE WESTERN JOURNAL: Trump Admin Launches 175 H-1B Visa Abuse Investigations in 'Project Firewall'. Blaze media: Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown. FOX NEWS: Trump admin reveals over 100 investigations into H-1B abuses as it pledges 'every resource' to protect US jobs.
